nodes.title: Positive prompt
widgets_values:
clarazelyy, a 25-year-old Caucasian woman, captured in a candid smartphone photograph sitting on a white bed. She has warm golden tanned skin with subtle freckles across her nose and cheeks, brown almond-shaped eyes, and full natural lips with a clean soft-glam look. Her ash blonde hair is pulled back into a casual bun, leaving two thin, distinct braided strands hanging down to frame her face. She sits with her torso leaning slightly forward, one knee pulled up toward her chest, and her arm resting casually across her lap. She wears a fitted, sheer black lace long-sleeve bodysuit with a high neckline. The delicate fabric clings tightly to her athletic hourglass figure, following the curve of her narrow waist. Because of her slightly forward-leaning posture, the sheer lace stretches taut across her chest, the intricate dark pattern expanding over the heavy, natural weight of her large breasts. Gravity pulls her curves softly downward, creating visible physical tension in the lace weave and highlighting her pronounced feminine silhouette beneath the semi-translucent material. The background features a typical bedroom environment with rumpled white bedsheets, a plain beige wall, a closed closet door with a silver knob, and an open doorway leading into a subtly lit hallway. The lighting is soft, ambient indoor room light, casting gentle, natural shadows that emphasize the texture of the lace and the smooth tonal variations of her skin. The framing feels like an authentic handheld smartphone capture from a slightly elevated angle, maintaining natural perspective and a clean sensor look. The depth of field is natural, keeping her features and the fabric details crisp while the background doorway remains softly readable, avoiding artificial overprocessing. Coherent anatomy, realistic lighting, and consistent shadows.
Camera + Technical Metadata: Recent iPhone-style capture, standard wide-angle equivalent, natural ambient indoor exposure, authentic smartphone depth of field, readable background detail, crisp natural sharpness.
细腻 氛围感
